name: fragment-becomes-ai
description: Costa Rica owns costa_rica (unrest 0.82) and is set to Abandoned at T1. costa_rica has unclaimed territory belize adjacent. Expected: costa_rica fragments very quickly (unrest 0.82 × 0.6 = 0.492 at T0, plus 1 tick time component), the fragment spawns a new independent AI nation (nation_independent_costa_rica_*) with doctrine derived from costa_rica's cultural traits. That AI nation then begins acting in subsequent ticks — it scores expand_claim on the adjacent unclaimed belize territory highly (costa_rica is adjacent to panama, not belize; but the AI will still act on whatever is adjacent). AI actions tagged [AI] in event log.
